---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for VWAR Loop Life
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
VWAR Loop Life stays local-first and on-device by design. Requests that would require
a server, an account, cloud sync, or sending data off the device are out of
scope — see the README and DISCLAIMER for what VWAR Loop Life is and isn't.
-->

## The problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## The idea

What you'd like VWAR Loop Life to do.

## Alternatives you've considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, if any.

## Additional context

Mockups, links to relevant protocol notes, or anything else that helps.
